title: One Piece World Like - Mine mine no mi
description: A Minecraft addon for the Mine Mine no Mi mod that transforms the world into a true One Piece-inspired adventure, featuring the Four Blues, the Red Line, Calm Belts, Reverse Mountain, and a dynamic island conquest system
body:
рҹҢҠрҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ MINE MINE NO MI вҖ” WORLD EXPANSION ADDON рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҢҠ

вҡ”пёҸ Transform your Minecraft world into a true ONE PIECE universe!

This addon completely changes the way the Minecraft world works, creating a massive adventure inspired by the world of One Piece, integrated with the Mine Mine no Mi mod and designed for a full SMP experience.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹҢҺ A COMPLETELY NEW WORLD SYSTEM
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The normal Minecraft world is gone.

The world is now divided into the legendary seas of One Piece:

рҹ”ө North Blue
рҹ”ө South Blue
рҹ”ө East Blue
рҹ”ө West Blue

Separated by:

рҹҹҘ The Red Line
рҹҢ«пёҸ The Calm Belts

Traveling between oceans is no longer simple. Every sea feels unique, dangerous, and alive.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
вӣ°пёҸ REVERSE MOUNTAIN SYSTEM
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Want to enter the Grand Line?

You must travel through the iconic Reverse Mountain route, just like in the anime and manga.

рҹҢҠ Dangerous sea paths
рҹҢҖ Grand Line access routes
вҡ пёҸ Risky navigation
рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ Real pirate progression

Crossing into the Grand Line finally feels like a real achievement.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹҸқпёҸ ISLAND & TERRITORY SYSTEM
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The addon introduces a dynamic island claiming system for survival multiplayer gameplay.

Players and crews can:

рҹҸҙ Claim islands
вҡ”пёҸ Fight for territory
рҹ‘Ҙ Create pirate crews
рҹ’° Expand influence
рҹӣЎпёҸ Protect conquered lands
рҹ”Ҙ Dominate entire seas

Claims are activity-based, rewarding active players and powerful crews.

The more your crew plays and controls territory, the stronger your presence becomes in the world.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
вҡ“ DESIGNED FOR SMP SERVERS
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

This project was built as part of a full One Piece SMP server experience.

Features include:

рҹҢҚ Massive world exploration
рҹҸқпёҸ Sea-based progression
вҡ”пёҸ Crew wars
рҹ’Җ Pirate alliances and betrayals
рҹ—әпёҸ Long-distance voyages
рҹҡў Grand Line adventures
рҹ‘‘ Territory domination

Every ocean becomes its own ecosystem with players creating their own pirate era.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ”Ҙ IMMERSIVE ONE PIECE EXPERIENCE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

This is not just a simple addon.

It is a complete overhaul of Minecraft's world structure to recreate the feeling of:

рҹҢҠ Sailing across dangerous oceans
рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ Becoming a pirate captain
вҡ”пёҸ Fighting for islands
рҹ§ӯ Exploring the Grand Line
рҹ‘‘ Building your own legend

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ–ҘпёҸ SERVER INFORMATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

151.243.218.20:25665

вҡ пёҸ REQUIREMENTS
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

вң… Mine Mine no Mi Mod
вң… Minecraft Forge / NeoForge (depending on your setup)
вң… Multiplayer recommended for full experience

рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ THE ERA OF PIRATES HAS BEGUN
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Will your crew conquer the seas...
or disappear beneath the waves?

вҡ“ Start your journey.
рҹҢҠ Enter the Grand Line.
рҹ‘‘ Become a legend.
